creator: ports@nicandneal.net
text: I'm having a go at making the changes you have asked for, but I have to say that it appears to be beyond my meagre make abilities. The main problem I'm having is that to use the ARCH variable, it must be after the .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>. After this point, no changes I make to OPTIONS_DEFINE take effect. How on earth can I make OPTIONS dependent on ARCH?
